mapper.select: select u.id, username, email, phone, status, avatar_url, gender, birthday, id_card, authority, school_id, un.name as university from user u left join university un on u.school_id = un.id where u.id = #{userId}

select count(c.id) as participateCompetitionNum from competition c left join competition_team ct on c.id = ct.competition_id left join team t on ct.team_id = t.id left join team_user tu on t.id = tu.team_id left join user u on tu.user_id = u.id where u.id = #{userId}
select count(a.id) as winNum from award a left join team t on a.team_id = t.id left join team_user tu on t.id = tu.team_id left join user u on tu.user_id = u.id where u.id = #{userId}
select count(w.id) as workNum from work w left join team t on w.team_id = t.id left join team_user tu on t.id = tu.team_id left join user u on tu.user_id = u.id where u.id = #{userId}
select count(t.id) as teamNum from team t left join team_user tu on t.id = tu.team_id left join user u on tu.user_id = u.id where u.id = #{userId}

select u.id, u.username, u.email, u.phone, u.status, u.last_login, u.avatar_url, u.gender, u.birthday, u.authority, u.school_id, un.name as university from user u left join university un on u.school_id = un.id where u.authority = #{commonUser} and not exists ( select 1 from team_user tu join team t on tu.team_id = t.id join competition_team ct on t.id = ct.team_id where ct.competition_id = #{competitionId} and tu.user_id = u.id )
and u.username like concat('%', #{username}, '%')
